gopay.phone_number: default phone number without country code
gopay.___otp_channel_options___: whatsapp (default) | sms; when sms is selected, the script waits for the countdown and then switches OTP delivery to SMS
gopay.___sms_switch_endpoint_hint___: Leave empty to use the built-in default. If GoPay changes the API, capture a HAR and put the exact URL here.

orchestrator.___otp_timeout_tip___: For SMS mode, 120+ seconds is recommended because the flow waits for the 30-second countdown after consent, switches to SMS, and then waits for the SMS platform to receive the message.

otp.___mode_options___: manual (POST /otp manually) | sms_api (poll an SMS receiving platform) | whatsapp (WhatsApp gRPC)
otp.___sms_tips___: If using sms_api, it is strongly recommended to also set gopay.otp_channel='sms'; otherwise the code will be sent to WhatsApp and the SMS platform will not receive it.
